2606.27154.title: OpenRCA 2.0: From Outcome Labels to Causal Process Supervision
2606.27154.paper_summary: Root cause analysis (RCA) poses a holistic test of LLM agentic capabilities, such as long-context understanding, multi-step reasoning, and tool use. However, existing datasets suffer from a fundamental gap: they label only the root cause, not the propagation path connecting it to the observed symptom, which largely simplifies the task to naive pattern matching. To support rigorous evaluation, we introduce PAVE, a step-wise labeling protocol that leverages known interventions from fault injection to reconstruct causal propagation paths. The mechanism is forward verification: reasoning from cause to effect rather than inferring backward from symptoms. Applying PAVE yields OpenRCA 2.0 (500 instances), the first cross-system RCA benchmark with step-wise causal annotations for LLM agents. Across 11 frontier LLMs, recovering the exact root-cause set succeeds in only 20.7% of cases on average. To locate where this difficulty lies, we relax the criterion and find what we call the ungrounded diagnosis: agents identify at least one correct root-cause service in 76.0% of cases, but ground that service in a verified causal propagation path to the observed symptom in only 61.5%. Outcome-only evaluation hides this failure mode; step-wise causal ground truth is the missing piece for trustworthy LLM-based RCA agents.
2606.27154.paper_summary_zh: 根本原因分析 (RCA) 對 LLM 的代理能力提出了全面的考驗，例如長期上下文理解、多步推理和工具使用。<lb/>然而，現有數據集存在一個根本性的缺陷：它們僅標記根本原因，而不標記將其與觀察到的症狀連接的傳播路徑，這在很大程度上簡化了任務，變成了幼稚的模式匹配。<lb/>為了支持嚴謹的評估，我們引入了 PAVE，一種逐步標記協議，利用已知的故障注入干預來重建因果傳播路徑。<lb/>該機制是前向驗證：從原因推理到結果，而不是從症狀向後推斷。<lb/>應用 PAVE 產生了 OpenRCA 2.0（500 個實例），這是首個具有逐步因果註釋的跨系統 RCA 基準，專為 LLM 代理設計。<lb/>在 11 個前沿 LLM 中，精確恢復根本原因集的成功率平均僅為 20.7%。<lb/>為了找出這一困難的所在，我們放寬了標準，發現了我們所稱的無根據診斷：代理在 76.0% 的案例中識別出至少一個正確的根本原因服務，但僅在 61.5% 的情況下將該服務與觀察到的症狀的經過驗證的因果傳播路徑相連接。<lb/>僅基於結果的評估隱藏了這一失敗模式；逐步因果真相是值得信賴的基於 LLM 的 RCA 代理所缺失的部分。
2606.27154.author: Aoyang Fang et.al.
2606.27154.authors: Aoyang Fang, Yifan Yang, Jin'ao Shang, Qisheng Lu, Junjielung Xu, Rui Wang, Songhan Zhang, Yuzhong Zhang, Boxi Yu, Pinjia He
